PRIVATE — Privacy Ops queue update

To: Privacy Engineering
From: Privacy Officer
Date: 24 May 2026

Re: DSR backlog — week of 24 May 2026

Pending items:

- One data subject access request from EU customer 4291 (DSAR opened 19 May).
- Three erasure requests under the right to erasure from the Berlin cohort.
- One California user invoking the right to delete and the right to know simultaneously.
- One do not sell my personal information request via the privacy portal.
- Two rectification requests (address corrections).
- A retention period has expired purge job is scheduled for next Tuesday.

Counsel confirms the data subject did withdraw consent for the analytics workflow on
23 May; mark the consent revocation in the audit log.
